extract: Dazzling Gleam (Japanese: マジカルシャイン Magical Shine) is a damage-dealing Fairy-type move introduced in Generation VI. It is: TM99 from Generation VI to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM32 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR92 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM21 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM079 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM092 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
